calendar.matters:
Notice Of Petition For Writ Of Mandate
Off Calendar Feb-24-2022 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES (via Zoom):

David J. Millstein; Millstein & Associates; 415-348-0348; appearing on behalf of petitioner Kazuko K. Artus.
Albert Flor, Jr.; Wendel Rosen LLP; 510-834-6600; appearing on behalf of respondent Gramercy Towers Condominium Association.

Hearing held. Upcoming elections and settlement discussions are discussed. After reviewing the pleadings and listening to oral arguments the Court rules as follows:

PETITIONER KAZUKO ARTUS' NOTICE OF PETITION FOR WRIT OF MANDATE is taken under submission. Both sides to submit proposed orders to the court for consideration.

Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not Reported. (D501)

Notice Of Petition For Writ Of Mandate
Off Calendar Feb-14-2022 Continued To Feb-22-22 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows: PETITIONER KAZUKO ARTUS' Petition For Writ Of Mandate is continued to February 22, 2022. Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (D501)

Notice Of Petition For Writ Of Mandate
Off Calendar Feb-07-2022 Continued To Feb-14-22 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PETITIONER KAZUKO ARTUS' Petition For Writ Of Mandate.

Petitioner's Petition for Writ of Mandate is continued to February 14, 2022 to allow the settlement process to complete per December 29, 2021 minute order.

Judge: Charles F. Haines, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (501/CFH)

Notice Of Petition For Writ Of Mandate
Off Calendar Jan-28-2022 Continued To Feb-07-22 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows:

PETITIONER KAZUKO ARTUS' NOTICE OF PETITION FOR WRIT OF MANDATE is continued to February 7, 2022 to allow the settlement process to complete per December 29, 2021 minute order.

Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not Reported. (D501)

Notice Of Petition For Writ Of Mandate
Off Calendar Dec-29-2021 Continued To Jan-28-22 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
David Millstein, 415.348.0340 of Millstein & Associates appearing via Zoom for Petitioner Kazuko Artus.
Albert Flor, 510.834.6600 of Wendel, Rosen, Black $ Dean LLP appearing via Zoom for Respondent Gramercy Towers Condominium Association.

Argued. Petitioner argues that a settlement conference would be pointless since the parties had previously participated in JAMS and was unsuccessful in reaching a settlement. The Respondent disagrees and states that he believes that the case will settle.

The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows: PETITIONER KAZUKO ARTUS Notice Of Petition For Writ Of Mandate is continued to January 28, 2022. On January 11, 2022 at 9:30 a.m. parties to appear for a Zoom settlement conference with Commissioner Pang Ly. Parties to e-mail Commissioner Ly no later than January 3, 2022 for a Zoom link (ply@sftc.org). Mr. Flor to prepare order. Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (501)

Notice Of Petition For Writ Of Mandate
Off Calendar Dec-22-2021 Continued To Dec-29-21 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PETITIONER KAZUKO ARTUS' Petition For Writ Of Mandate is Transferred to be heard in department 501 at 9:30 a.m. on December 29, 2021. That department handles all cases arising out of the ownership of real property per SF Local Rule 8.10A1.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman, Clerk: S. Le, Not Reported. =(302/EPS)
